cards.flavor_text: [i]This thing grew out of the Qlipoth's tendrils infecting the steel in a shipyard. Not sure who named it after the Devil Arm, but they're not related. [/i]

cards.rules_text:
Defender
When this creature enters or leaves the battlefield, create a tapped Treasure token.

When this artifact enters, move a counter from any number of target creatures onto this artifact.
When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, draw a card for each counter on it, then put all of those counters on target creature.

When this artifact enters, mill three cards. When you do, return up to one target artifact or creature card from your graveyard to your hand.
Whenever one or more artifact or creature cards leave your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on up to that many creatures.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Whenever Nero needed a resupply, he seemed to find one of these. Don't ask me how they still worked.[/i]

cards.flavor_text: [i]The Order was positively obsessed with reconstructing one of Sparda's swords. No clue how they got it.[/i]
